title: Add AyurGlow Secrets logo and change welcome section text to black

requirements.summary: Change the color of the welcome heading text and subheading in the hero section to black
acceptanceCriteria: The welcome heading and descriptive text are displayed in black color
The tagline 'Ancient Ayurvedic Wisdom for Healthy Body, Glowing Skin & Strong Hair' is displayed in black color
Text remains readable against the background with sufficient contrast

file_operations.description: Update the hero section text elements to use black color. Change the h1 heading 'Welcome to AyurGlow Secrets', the descriptive paragraph text, and the tagline 'Ancient Ayurvedic Wisdom for Healthy Body, Glowing Skin & Strong Hair' from their current earth-tone colors to black (text-black or text-gray-900) while maintaining readability against the background.

requirements.summary: Display the generated AyurGlow Secrets logo image in the navigation header and footer
acceptanceCriteria: The logo image is displayed in the navigation header
The logo image is displayed in the footer
The logo is appropriately sized and aligned with existing navigation elements
The logo maintains its aspect ratio and visual quality

file_operations.description: Replace the current text-based brand name with an img element displaying the generated logo from frontend/public/assets/generated/ayurglow-logo.dim_400x120.png. Position and size the logo appropriately within the navigation bar, ensuring it aligns with existing navigation elements and maintains its aspect ratio.

Replace the current brand icon (Leaf) and text-based branding in the footer with an img element displaying the generated logo from frontend/public/assets/generated/ayurglow-logo.dim_400x120.png. Size the logo appropriately for the footer context while maintaining its aspect ratio and visual quality.
